name: ENNIS, INC.
business: Ennis is a trade printer that manufactures a broad range of printed products, including business forms, pressure-seal forms, labels, tags, envelopes, and presentation folders, which are resold throughout the United States through a network of independent distributors. Approximately 95% of the products are custom or semi-custom.
sellsTo: Payroll and accounts payable software companies

exposures.sentence: Digital technologies will continue to erode the demand for our printed business documents.
We believe that cybersecurity is important to maintaining the trust of our customers and employees.
